meta_description: Instant quotes for powder coated parts. Parts are machined and run through a powder coating process. Strong, wear-resistant finish that is compatible with all metal materials.

sections.heading: Powder coating services
sections.text: Surface finishes Powder coating services We offer several powder coating finishes that improve the strength and wear-resistance of your metal parts. Powder coating is compatible with all metals and available in glossy or matte gloss. Get instant quote

sections.heading: Color options for powder coating
sections.text: Color options for powder coating Black White RAL color Pantone color

sections.heading: Gloss options for powder coating
sections.text: Gloss options for powder coating Smooth matte 16 to 25 units Glossy 80 to 95 units

sections.heading: Design considerations for powder coating
sections.text: Design considerations for powder coating Hanging and jigging marks: Powder coating involves suspending parts via a 芒聙聹jig芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹rack.芒聙聺 This will leave marks on your part where powder coating wasn芒聙聶t possible. If there are areas where you can芒聙聶t accept 芒聙聹jig芒聙聺 marks, please remember to include a technical drawing indicating these areas. Masking: Remember to indicate in your CAD file whether you want specific part areas to be masked or plugged.As material is applied to the surface during powder coating, all threaded and reamed holes or other critical-to-function surfaces are plugged or masked as standard. Tolerances: Tolerances are met before the coating finish. We recommend that you...

sections.heading: The Protolabs Network powder coating process
sections.text: The Protolabs Network powder coating process The Protolabs Network powder coating process Powder coating is a strong, wear-resistant surface finish that is compatible with all metal materials. Here芒聙聶s how to apply powder coating: Clean parts to remove inorganic contaminants To enhance performance and quality, pretreat parts with a conversion coating Rinse and dry parts in an oven Mask critical areas to prevent tolerance issues Coat parts with an electrostatic spray gun Dry parts in an oven to cure the coating Read more about powder coating

sections.heading: FAQ's
sections.text: FAQ's When should you apply powder coating? Powder coating provides a cost-effective, tough and durable finish on your parts that increases their longevity and resistance to harsh environments. This makes it idea for marine applications, for instance. What are the best applications of powder coating? Powder coating makes metal parts resistant to outdoor conditions, including heat, cold damage and corrosion. You芒聙聶re likely to find powder coating on parts used in farming equipment, industrial machinery and high-usage automotive applications. How durable and resistant is powder coating? Powder coated parts typically remain resistant to wear for up to 20 years. Consistent exposure to UV light...
